prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SSHIPFLASK-6OZ Product Type: HIP_FLASK Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel Hip Flask 6 Oz Capacity Screw Cap for Camping Hiking Description: Bring your favorite drink with you on the go while camping or hiking with the ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel Hip Flask.

This flask has a 6oz capacity and comes with an attached screw top for convenience pouring. It is constructed of durable 201 stainless steel so you'll never have to worry about it rusting or succumbing to the elements. At just 4.5" x 4" x /75", it will easily fit inside most pockets, backpacks, purses or utility bags. Make sure to bring one of these along to your next camping or hiking adventure. Search Terms: hip flask stainless steel silver trekking hiking snowboarding skiing backpacking camping gear RV camp kitchen beverage tailgating ASR Outdoor whiskey water alcohol gifts wilderness adventure groomsmen boating drinking cups campfire BBQ Features: - Material: 201 Stainless Steel - Style: Traditional Hip Flask - Dimensions: 4.5" x 4" x 3/4" - Capacity: 6oz - Attached Screw Cap === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6oz Stainless Steel Hip Flask Screw Cap

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6oz Silver Stainless Steel Hip Flask

anthropic.title_differentiation: Durable 201 Stainless Steel, Attached Screw Cap, Pocket-Sized 45 Inch, Camping Hiking Outdoor

openai.title_differentiation: 201 Stainless Steel, Attached Screw Cap, Compact 45"X4"x34", Rust Resistant, Fits Pockets, Camping And Hiking
